mapper.insert: insert into TEMPLATE (TEMPLATE_NAME, SELECT_CON, HDQR_BOB_DCD, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, DEL_YN, LEARNING_TYPE) values (#{templateName}, #{selectCon}, #{hdqrBobDcd}, #{memId}, current_timestamp(), #{memId}, current_timestamp(), 'N', #{learningType})
mapper.select: select count(*) from TEMPLATE t inner join HC_MEMBER hm on t.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID

select
,hm.MEM_NAME as regName ,scheduler.schedulerCnt from TEMPLATE t inner join HC_MEMBER hm on t.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID left join ( select count(*) schedulerCnt , ls.TEMPLATE_ID from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls group by ls.TEMPLATE_ID ) scheduler on t.ID = scheduler.TEMPLATE_ID
order by REG_DT desc
mapper.update:
update TEMPLATE t set t.DEL_YN = 'Y', t.MOD_ID = #{memId}, t.MOD_DT = current_timestamp() where t.ID in
#{item}
mapper.select:
select
from TEMPLATE t where t.ID = #{id}
select count(*) from TEMPLATE t where t.DEL_YN = 'N' and t.TEMPLATE_NAME = #{templateName}
